original_text: Ngày xưa, có một năm trời nắng hạn như thiêu đốt, mặt đất nóng ran.
translated_text: Once upon a time, the sun blazed down relentlessly like fire on the earth.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, a harsh orange sun blazing over a barren landscape, heat waves shimmering in the air, intense warm colors, 8k resolution, professional artwork.
subject: Sun,Earth

original_text: Ruộng đồng nứt nẻ thành những khe sâu, cây cối trụi trơ lá khô.
translated_text: The soil in the rice paddies cracked open into deep fissures. Trees stood bare with withered brown leaves.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, dry and cracked rice paddies with deep fissures, a lone withered tree with no leaves, desolate atmosphere, earthy tones, masterpiece quality.
subject: Soil,Withered tree

original_text: Chim muông kiệt sức, nằm há mỏ trên mặt đất khô cằn vì khát.
translated_text: Birds lay panting on the dry ground with their beaks open.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, small birds lying exhausted on parched earth, their beaks wide open in thirst, dusty and dry environment, highly detailed, 8k resolution.
subject: Birds

original_text: Một chú Cóc nhỏ thấy nguy quá, quyết định nhảy lên thiên đình kiện Trời.
translated_text: A small Toad, seeing the dry land, decided to jump towards the sky to complain to the Jade Emperor.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, a small determined toad looking up at the swirling clouds of the sky, preparation for a journey, vibrant green skin against dry brown earth, professional artwork.
subject: Toad

original_text: Dọc đường bụi bặm, Cóc gặp và đi cùng Cua, Gấu đen, Cọp, bầy Ong và Cáo.
translated_text: Along the dusty road, he was joined by a Crab, a huge black Bear, a striped Tiger, a swarm of Bees, and a sly Fox. They marched together in a line.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, a line of diverse animals including a bear, tiger, and fox walking along a dusty rural road led by a small toad, folk art aesthetics, highly detailed.
subject: Toad,Crab,Bear,Tiger,Fox,Bees

original_text: Đến cửa nhà Trời, họ thấy một cái trống đỏ khổng lồ treo ở đó. Cóc chỉ tay phân công.
translated_text: They arrived at the golden Gates of Heaven, where a giant red drum hung. The Toad pointed his finger to direct them.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, a giant red ceremonial drum hanging at the golden gates of heaven, the small toad pointing his finger to give orders, majestic atmosphere, 8k resolution.
subject: Toad,Giant Drum

original_text: Cóc bảo Cua bò vào chum nước, Ong nấp sau cánh cửa.
translated_text: The Crab crawled into a large earthen water jar. The Bees hid behind the door.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, a small crab crawling into a large terracotta water jar, a swarm of bees hiding behind an ornate golden palace door, masterpiece quality.
subject: Crab,Water Jar,Bees

original_text: Còn Cáo, Gấu và Cọp thì nấp thấp xuống trong đám mây ở hai bên.
translated_text: The Fox, the Bear, and the Tiger crouched low in the clouds on both sides.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, a fox, a bear, and a tiger crouching low within swirling white and gold celestial clouds, eyes peeking out, tactical position, professional artwork.
subject: Fox,Bear,Tiger

original_text: Cóc đứng một mình, cầm dùi đánh ba hồi trống: Tùng! Tùng! Tùng!
translated_text: The Toad stood alone and beat the drum three times with a stick: Boom! Boom! Boom!
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, a small toad standing on its hind legs, using a wooden mallet to hit a giant red drum, sound waves vibrating, dramatic scene, highly detailed.
subject: Toad,Giant Drum

original_text: Ngọc Hoàng ngồi trên ngai vàng nổi giận đập tay xuống ghế, sai Gà ra trị tội.
translated_text: The Jade Emperor, sitting on his golden throne, slammed his fist on the armrest and sent a Rooster out.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, the Jade Emperor in royal robes sitting on a dragon throne, slamming his fist in anger, pointing his finger at a rooster, 8k resolution.
subject: Jade Emperor,Rooster

original_text: Gà vừa đập cánh bay ra thì Cáo từ trong mây nhảy xổ tới cắn cổ tha đi.
translated_text: As the Rooster flapped its wings, the Toad signaled. The Fox leaped out from the clouds and bit the Rooster's neck.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, a sly fox leaping out of the clouds to catch a rooster by the neck, dynamic feathers flying in the air, action sequence, masterpiece quality.
subject: Fox,Rooster

original_text: Ngọc Hoàng chỉ tay sai Chó dữ ra bắt Cáo.
translated_text: The Emperor pointed his finger, sending a fierce Dog to catch the Fox.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, the Jade Emperor pointing a finger sternly, a fierce black dog with bared teeth charging out of the palace gates, high drama, professional artwork.
subject: Jade Emperor,Dog

original_text: Chó vừa ra tới cửa, Gấu đen to lớn đã vung tay tát Chó ngã lăn quay.
translated_text: But as soon as the Dog reached the gate, the huge black Bear swiped his heavy paw and knocked the Dog down.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, a massive black bear swiping its large paw at a dog, the dog tumbling backward, celestial palace background, highly detailed.
subject: Bear,Dog

original_text: Ngọc Hoàng đỏ mặt tía tai, sai Thần Sét mặc giáp vàng cầm búa ra trận.
translated_text: The Emperor's face turned red. He ordered the Thunder God, who wore golden armor and held a lightning axe, to attack.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, the Thunder God in shimmering golden armor holding a massive lightning hammer, angry facial expression, lightning sparks, 8k resolution.
subject: Jade Emperor,Thunder God

original_text: Thần Sét vừa hùng hổ đi ra thì bầy Ong sau cửa bay ùa ra đốt tới tấp vào mặt.
translated_text: Suddenly, the swarm of Bees flew out from behind the door and stung the God's face repeatedly.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, a swarm of hundreds of bees surrounding the Thunder God, stinging his face, the God shielding his eyes, dynamic and chaotic, masterpiece quality.
subject: Bees,Thunder God

original_text: Thần Sét la hét nhảy vào chum nước trốn, liền bị Cua kẹp đau điếng.
translated_text: Screaming and covering his face, the Thunder God jumped into the water jar. Inside, the Crab pinched him with its sharp claws.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, the Thunder God jumping into a large water jar while a crab pinches his finger with sharp claws, water splashing, comical yet dramatic, professional artwork.
subject: Crab,Thunder God,Water Jar

original_text: Thần hoảng hốt nhảy ra khỏi chum thì bị Cọp vằn chờ sẵn vồ lấy.
translated_text: The God leaped out of the jar, only to be pounced on by the striped Tiger waiting outside.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, a powerful striped tiger pouncing on the panicked Thunder God, sharp claws extended, palace floor background, 8k resolution.
subject: Tiger,Thunder God

original_text: Thấy quân lính thua trận nằm la liệt, Ngọc Hoàng đành xua tay mời Cóc vào.
translated_text: The Jade Emperor, seeing his soldiers lying on the ground, waved his hand to invite the Toad in.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, the Jade Emperor waving his hand in defeat, looking at his defeated soldiers on the palace floor, inviting the small toad inside, masterpiece quality.
subject: Jade Emperor,Toad

original_text: Cóc ngồi đĩnh đạc tâu: "Muôn tâu, trần gian khô hạn quá, xin Thượng đế làm mưa ngay cứu muôn loài".
translated_text: The Toad sat calmly on the heavenly floor and spoke: "Your Majesty, the Earth is dry. You must send rain immediately to save all living things."
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, the small toad sitting respectfully but firmly on a silk carpet before the Emperor, wide shot of the throne room, highly detailed.
subject: Toad,Jade Emperor

original_text: Ngọc Hoàng thở dài dựa lưng vào ngai, dịu giọng bảo Cóc về đi, sẽ có mưa.
translated_text: The Emperor sighed and leaned back on his throne. He spoke softly: "Go home. I will send rain."
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, the Jade Emperor leaning back with a tired expression, nodding to the toad, soft and calm lighting in the palace, 8k resolution.
subject: Jade Emperor,Toad

original_text: Ngọc Hoàng dặn thêm: "Lần sau muốn mưa cứ nghiến răng, không cần lên đây nữa".
translated_text: He added, "Next time, just grind your teeth to signal me. You do not need to come up here."
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, close up of the Jade Emperor speaking kindly to the toad, the toad listening intently, celestial curtains in the background, professional artwork.
subject: Jade Emperor,Toad

original_text: Cóc về đến trần gian thì mưa to đã ngập đầy ruộng đồng nứt nẻ.
translated_text: When the Toad returned to Earth, heavy rain was falling, filling the cracked rice paddies with water.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, heavy rain pouring over a green village, water filling the dry cracks in the earth, the toad standing happily in the rain, masterpiece quality.
subject: Toad,Rain

original_text: Từ đó về sau, hễ Cóc nghiến răng là trời lại đổ mưa.
translated_text: Since then, whenever the Toad grinds his teeth, the sky pours rain.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, a small toad on a rock grinding its teeth, dark rain clouds forming in the sky, a symbolic and peaceful ending, 8k resolution.
subject: Toad
